name: Flowtriq Agent
description: Real-time DDoS detection agent that monitors network traffic, classifies attacks by protocol and vector, captures forensic PCAPs, and triggers automated mitigation.

notes.text: After installation, run `ftagent --setup` to configure your API key and Node UUID from the Flowtriq dashboard.
A free 14-day trial is available at flowtriq.com/signup. No credit card required.
The container runs privileged to allow raw packet capture (CAP_NET_RAW).
